domain: Barn owl asymmetric ear — left ear up + right ear down → ILD encodes elevation; deliberate craniofacial asymmetry creates an extra localization dimension that two symmetric ears cannot encode.
specific_mechanism: Deliberate parallel-pathway asymmetry creates information content that neither pathway can encode in isolation.
llm_application: ASYM-DUAL-PATH: parallel input encoder with two pathways carrying built-in asymmetric encoding biases (e.g., path A early-token feature emphasis, path B late-token feature emphasis); their difference (ILD-style) injected as extra feature channel encoding sequence-position information neither path encodes alone.
novelty_claim: Standard parallel attention heads symmetrize. Sparse-decorrelation pattern separation is symmetric. ASYM-DUAL-PATH's distinctive contribution is DELIBERATE pathway asymmetry whose DIFFERENCE-CHANNEL encodes additional information neither pathway can encode alone — information-creating asymmetry.
